/nix/store/874j5xydsj6nr6i1zdrjvhln5gmxvvrr-clang-wrapper-21.1.8/bin/clang  -O3 -Wall -Wextra -ffreestanding -nostdlib -fno-stack-protector -fno-pie -no-pie  -nostdlib -no-pie -static -nostdlib -e _start -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/foolisbox.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/foolisbox.dir/src/entry.asm.o CMakeFiles/foolisbox.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/foolisbox.dir/src/utils/cat.c.o CMakeFiles/foolisbox.dir/src/utils/cp.c.o CMakeFiles/foolisbox.dir/src/utils/echo.c.o -o foolisbox
